description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named internal_pymnn_release that triggers on push to specific paths and tags, pull requests to the master branch, and workflow dispatches. The workflow should have a matrix job build_wheels that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-24.04-arm, windows-latest, macos-13, macos-14) with different architectures (x86_64, aarch64, AMD64, arm64) and build configurations (cp*-manylinux*, cp*). For each matrix entry, check out the repository with submodules, apply a private schema patch if needed, set up Python 3.12, install pipx if necessary, build wheels using cibuildwheel, and upload the resulting wheels as artifacts.
